overall.description: First-person perspective in a cyberpunk-style diner from a video game. The player initially sits across from a character wearing a white hat who is smoking, then transitions to walking through the neon-lit interior with purple and green lighting toward an elevator. The environment features checkered floors, diner booths, and futuristic signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: diner booth seating area with red leather benches

events.description: camera pans left to reveal more of the diner interior and background signage
pedestrian walks past in the background carrying a bag
screen fades to black indicating a scene cut

agents.ego_description: sitting in a diner booth observing the character across the table and the surrounding environment

walking past in the background from left to right

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a neon-lit diner booth where the player sits across from a character in a white hat who is smoking. The camera slowly pans left, revealing the diner interior and a pedestrian walking past in the background. The table holds disposable cups, a green soda can, and a magazine. The environment features red leather seating and purple neon lighting before fading to black.

scene_state.functional_zone: diner main hall with checkered flooring and elevator access

events.description: scene cuts to first-person walking perspective through the diner main hall
slowing down as approaching the elevator doors at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the diner main hall toward the elevator at the end of the corridor

notable_agents.action: person in plaid shirt sitting alone at a round table

entered.detail: yellow and blue checkered tile flooring covering the main hall
structural concrete pillars with mounted television screens
multiple television screens mounted on the support pillars
long communal dining table with attached benches
large neon sign with 'Pizza' text in yellow and purple
metal double doors with purple lighting above and small windows
vertical banner with star pattern hanging on the wall
tall vending machine with green illuminated display
green neon arrow sign pointing directionally on the wall

segments.scene_description: Following a transition, the player walks through the diner's main hall featuring distinctive yellow and blue checkered flooring. The camera passes long dining tables, support pillars with mounted TVs, and a seated NPC before approaching a set of elevator doors illuminated by purple lighting. The environment includes neon signage, vending machines, and American flag banners on the tiled walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that moves from an intimate conversation in a neon-lit booth to a walk through the expansive main hall of a cyberpunk diner. It begins seated across from a smoking character in a white hat, with the camera panning left to reveal disposable cups and a magazine on the table amidst red leather seating and purple lighting. As the view shifts from the booth, the scene opens into the diner's main hall, where the camera glides across distinctive yellow and blue checkered flooring. The movement continues past long dining tables, support pillars with mounted TVs, and vending machines under the glow of neon signage and American flag banners. The journey finally concludes as the camera approaches a set of elevator doors illuminated by a deep purple light.
